days.text: Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers at night. Force 2 to 4 south to southeasterly winds.
Cloudy. Occasional showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Showers, heavy at first. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 5 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
